action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline ER (20 exemplars, 2 epochs/task) achieved only 0.087 average accuracy, with task_0=0.0 and task_9=0.694, showing severe forgetting. Analysis: Need larger replay buffer, better exemplar selection (herding), and knowledge distillation (iCaRL-style). We have ample compute time (4.97 h, 27 iterations); each full training should take ~6-12 min at 15 epochs/task. Decision: Implement iCaRL-like approach with herding selection, 50 exemplars/class, distillation using teacher model, and partial pretrained ResNet-18 initialization. Then train for 15 epochs/task and submit eval to measure gain.
